# sheets-translate-to-json

> Convert Google Sheets translations into structured JSON files for i18n workflows.

## Overview

sheets-translate-to-json is a Node.js/TypeScript library that reads translation data from Google Sheets spreadsheets and generates structured JSON files, one per language. It supports nested keys via dot notation, multi-sheet merging, and both ESM and CommonJS.

## Installation

```bash
npm install sheets-translate-to-json
```

## Quick start

```typescript
import { SheetManager } from 'sheets-translate-to-json';

const manager = new SheetManager(privateKey, clientEmail, sheetId);
await manager.init('./translations');
// Generates en.json, fr.json, es.json, etc.
```

## API

### SheetManager(privateKey: string, clientEmail: string, sheetId: string)

Creates a manager instance connected to a Google Sheet via a service account.

### manager.init(userPath: string, sheetNames?: string[]): Promise<void>

Main method. Reads data from the spreadsheet and writes one JSON file per language to `userPath`. If `sheetNames` is provided, only those sheets are processed; otherwise all sheets are read and merged.

### manager.read(sheetPosition?: number): Promise<SheetData>

Reads data from a single sheet by zero-based index (default: 0).

### manager.readByName(sheetName: string): Promise<SheetData>

Reads data from a specific sheet by its tab name. Throws if not found.

### manager.readAllSheets(): Promise<{ [sheetName: string]: SheetData }>

Reads all sheets. Returns an object keyed by sheet name.

### manager.write(data: SheetData, directoryPath: string): void

Writes SheetData to JSON files (one per language). Creates the directory if needed. This method is synchronous.

### manager.readLocal(directoryPath: string): SheetData

Reads JSON files from a local directory back into SheetData format. Only reads `.json` files. Throws if the directory doesn't exist.

### manager.push(directoryPath: string, sheetName?: string): Promise<void>

Reads local JSON files and uploads them to Google Sheets. Flattens nested objects back to dot-notation. If sheetName is provided and doesn't exist, creates a new sheet.

### manager.sync(directoryPath: string, options?: SyncOptions): Promise<SyncResult>

Two-way sync between local JSON files and Google Sheets. Compares local and remote data and reconciles based on the chosen strategy (default: merge).

### manager.listSheets(): Promise<string[]>

Returns an array of all sheet tab names.

## Types

```typescript
interface NestedObject {
  [key: string]: string | NestedObject | undefined;
}

interface SheetData {
  [key: string]: NestedObject;
}
```

SheetData keys are language codes (matching spreadsheet column headers). Values are nested translation objects. Dot-notation keys (e.g., `nav.home`) are automatically expanded.

```typescript
type SyncStrategy = 'local' | 'remote' | 'merge';

interface SyncOptions {
  strategy?: SyncStrategy;  // default: 'merge'
  sheetName?: string;       // specific sheet to sync with
  createSheet?: boolean;    // create sheet if not found (default: false)
}

interface SyncResult {
  added: { local: number; remote: number };
  updated: { local: number; remote: number };
  languages: string[];
}
```

- `SyncStrategy` — `'local'` (local wins), `'remote'` (remote wins), or `'merge'` (combine both, prefer local on conflicts).
- `SyncOptions` — Configuration for sync: strategy, target sheet name, and whether to create the sheet if missing.
- `SyncResult` — Describes the outcome: keys added/updated on each side, and which languages were synced.

## Spreadsheet format

| key       | en      | fr       | es     |
|-----------|---------|----------|--------|
| greeting  | Hello   | Bonjour  | Hola   |
| nav.home  | Home    | Accueil  | Inicio |
| nav.about | About   | A propos | Acerca |

Column A contains translation keys. Other columns are languages with the header as the language code.

## Prerequisites

- Node.js >= 18.0
- Google Cloud service account with Google Sheets API enabled
- Spreadsheet shared with the service account email

## Links

- Documentation: https://josephjoberno.github.io/sheets-translate-to-json/
- Repository: https://github.com/josephjoberno/sheets-translate-to-json
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/sheets-translate-to-json
